scorer.age_years: Company has been on the market for {years} years.
scorer.age_eu: General EU API does not provide incorporation date for {country}.
scorer.age_unknown: Unable to verify the company's opening date.
scorer.reg_pl_bad: Formal/legal status in Poland is not fully correct (status: {legal}, VAT: {vat}, Whitelist: {whitelist}).
scorer.reg_pl_good: Company fully active, registered as VAT payer, on the bank whitelist.
scorer.reg_eu_good: Entity successfully verified in the European VIES database.
scorer.reg_eu_bad: Entity is not registered as a VAT payer in the European VIES database (status: {legal}, VAT: {vat}).
scorer.cap_eu: Detailed capital and execution structure for {country} requires commercial international reports.
scorer.cred_pl_good: Taxpayer is listed as an active VAT payer on the whitelist.
scorer.cred_pl_bad: Taxpayer is not listed as an active VAT payer on the whitelist (status: {status}).
scorer.cred_eu_unknown: Unable to verify VAT status for country {country}.
scorer.sanctions_yes: Entity appears on the official sanctions list.
scorer.sanctions_no: No records found on official sanctions lists.
scorer.bailiff_unknown: No data on bailiff proceedings (data unavailable from KRS) - neutral score assigned.
scorer.web_ssl_yes: Website secured with a valid SSL/TLS certificate (+2 pts).
scorer.web_ssl_no: Website does not have an active/valid SSL/TLS certificate (0 pts).
scorer.web_age_2y: Domain registered over 2 years ago ({days} days ago) (+2 pts).
scorer.web_age_6m: Domain registered over 6 months ago ({days} days ago) (+1 pts).
scorer.web_age_short: Domain registered recently ({days} days ago) (0 pts).
scorer.web_age_no: No domain age data available in RDAP (0 pts).
scorer.web_act_90: Website actively maintained, last activity {days} days ago (+2 pts).
scorer.web_act_180: Moderate website activity, last updated {days} days ago (+1 pts).
scorer.web_act_old: Website has not been updated for {days} days (0 pts).
scorer.web_act_no: No active RSS feed or new articles (0 pts).
scorer.web_nip_yes: Identity match: Company's NIP found on its website (+2 pts).
scorer.web_nip_no: Company's NIP was not found directly on the homepage (0 pts).
scorer.web_no: Official contractor website not found (0 pts).
scorer.web_news_yes: Mentions of the company detected in media (Google News) (+2 pts).
scorer.web_news_no: No significant mentions of the company in media (0 pts).
